title: Brewin' And Chewin' | Excalibur Support
description: Resource pack to support Brewin' And Chewin' with the style of Excalibur
body:
Resource pack to support the mod addon of Brewin' And Chewin' By lumpazl to match the style and color palette of Excalibur resource pack by Maffhew

Almost all the textures (at least 97%) were edited to work in together with the Excalibur resource pack. All the complementary textures on the items above the coasters were modified, as seen in the images.

The Brewin' and Chewin' mod requires the main mod Farmer's Delight, so I recommend using the Farmer's Delight Resource Pack made by TC_, from which many textures helped to color several items in this resource pack.


![3C](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a5f96e269cf9ae9679f175506175800d39c47d9.jpeg)
features :



- Retextures of all blocks, items and interface (HUD and GUI)
- Includes all textures for the item models on the coasters from Farmer's Delight and main game
- Adjusting a few models to combine with the others resource packs
- Fix a missing model that had a texture without a model (baked_potato)



![bnc-items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/224bde66adacdd3f213ab77f4f8e8e2b7fb7cdeb_0.webp)

![Bnc - ITEMS2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5981d53731ff8e8123103e376d72a1b54f9f3146.png)

Credits:

lumpazl - Brewin' And Chewin'

Maffhew - Excalibur resource pack

TC_ - Farmer's Delight Resource Pack
